title: Tax Results
emptySubtitle: Upload a CSV first to see your tax calculation results.
noCalculationsDetail: Upload your broker CSV to get started.
earlyFilingDetail: Submit by {{earlyDeadline}} for a {{rate}}% discount. Final deadline: {{finalDeadline}}.
saveError: Failed to save. Is the server running?
readyToFile: Ready to file your tax return?
readyToFileDetail: Use the Filing Guide to copy values directly into your tax form.
parseWarningTitle: We detected an inconsistency in your statement
parseWarningBody: The numbers below may be wrong. Contact me before filing and we will verify together what does not match.
betaBrokerBody: We built the {{broker}} parser from the broker's published export format, without a real account to validate against. Check these numbers against your statement before you file. If anything looks off, contact me.
dividendCreditBody: This statement doesn't list the foreign tax withheld on your dividends, so the dividend tax above assumes none was withheld. If tax was withheld abroad, enter the total to apply the foreign-tax credit.
dividendCreditConverted: {{local}} {{symbol}} applied as a credit, converted at the BNR annual-average rate.
dividendCreditHint: You can find this in your broker's tax statement or your own records. The credit can't exceed the Romanian dividend tax.
